name: replit
description: Turn your ideas into real apps

interface.shortDescription: Turn your ideas into real apps
interface.longDescription:
Replit app in ChatGPT lets you build real web or mobile apps just by describing what you want with prompts in ChatGPT.

Select the Replit app in ChatGPT, tell it your app idea, and its AI will create the app for you- writing the code, setting everything up behind the scenes, and showing you a live version you can try right away. You can keep improving it by sending more messages without leaving ChatGPT.

Replit app in ChatGPT keeps things simple: you provide input on what the app should do, and the Replit Agent handles building and updating the app itself.
defaultPrompt: I need a website for my bookstore
